ddls:
CREATE TABLE "texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the text */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the text */,
  "pub_year" INTEGER /* Year the text was published */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the text */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the text (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "gender_author" TEXT /* Gender of the author */,
  "country_of_birth_author" TEXT /* Country where the author was born */,
  "author_birth_location" TEXT /* Location where the author was born */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the author's information is verified */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text where the character is mentioned */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Family name of the character */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* Given name of the character */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the character */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religion of the character */,
  "relig_att_char" TEXT /* Religious attitude or characteristic of the character */,
  "character_type" TEXT /* Type of character (e.g., fictional, historical) */,
  "character_role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the text (e.g., protagonist, antagonist) */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance of the character (e.g., major, minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text where the location is mentioned */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., fictional, real) */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the location */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Historical significance of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text where the mention occurs */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character mentioned */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location mentioned */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the mention occurs */,
  "page_event_number" INTEGER /* Page number where the mention occurs */,
  "line" TEXT /* Line where the mention occurs */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the mention (e.g., dialogue, narrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text where the event occurs */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the text */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_text_versions_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES texts ("text_id")
)
